title: Aokiji Steps Onto the Island
description: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Aokiji, Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: to terrify Nico Robin to this extent...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: little boys shouldn't be so aggressive.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm only here for a walk.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The highest ranked fighters of the Marine...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What is someone like him doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: I told you to chill, kids...

dialogue.speaker: Aokiji
dialogue.text: No need for so much hostility.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you sure you're not mistaken, Nico Robin?

summary: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
